mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question_delivery (user_id, question_id, answer_token) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{answerToken})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question_delivery WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(sent_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT id, user_id, question_id, answer_token, sent_at, answered, reminder_sent FROM question_delivery WHERE answered = FALSE AND reminder_sent = FALSE AND sent_at <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{hoursAgo} HOUR)
